title: Homemory Flickering Flameless Candles with String Lights, Battery Operated Candles with Remote Control and Timer, Embedded Fairy Lights LED Candles, Acrylic, Home Decoration, White, Set of 5
features: Embedded String Lights: The acrylic candle holder is embedded with string lights inside, like several small "stars," to add light and charm. Light up your space with ease, whether it's a cozy corner, a relaxing bath, or a centerpiece for a special occasion etc. This candle is perfect for decorating with wall sconces, lanterns, and candle holders.

With remote control: you can set a certain time for lighting the candles, turn them all on and off remotely. With the remote control, you can adjust the brightness, turn off the string of lights, or switch the flameless candle to flicker (realistic) or just steady light.

Flicker/Realistic Mode: Our candle features a 3D wick design and is a fixed bulb in the shape of a flame. The candle flickers like a real candle, and the soft and slight flickering of the candle light does not "dance" like other flames.

Safe and Flameless: These LED candles offer the beauty of traditional candles without the risk of an open flame. Enjoy peace of mind as they provide a safe option, especially in homes with children or pets where you don't have to worry about fire.

Package includes: This candle set consists of 5 candles (D 5.6 cm x H 12.7 cm, 12.7 cm, 15.2 cm, 17.8 cm, 20.3 cm), an 11-button remote control, and an instruction manual. Each flameless candle is powered by 2 AA batteries (not included) and can last for more than 500 hours.
description: Product Description Homemory Acrylic White Flickering Flameless Candles with String Lights, Set of 5 For Indoor Use Only These decorative candles are perfect for mantelpieces, living room decorations and can even be placed near bookshelves and windows. Realistic design LED flame candle, simulates black wick and wax - soothing romantic atmosphere make electric candles like traditional pillar candles, bring beauty and warmth to all places. D 2.2" x H 5"5"6"7"8" Applicable for multiple scenarios Ideal for indoor decoration, you can place them on the dining table, fireplace, desk, or indoor lanterns, also as an atmosphere candlelight in your bed. If you have a special event or festival, they are also a good choice of decorative candles. Special design and robust material The embedded light design makes these radiant candles even more romantic and transports you to a fairytale dream. In addition, the transparent acrylic material is stronger and lighter than conventional glass. Convenient remote control and timer Our flameless candles with remote control allow you to set the brightness, flicker mode and program a 2H/4H/6H/8H timer so you don't have to tediously turn these battery candles on and off.
